name: Spicy Applesauce Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
- Generously grease and flour the bottom, sides, and rim of two 9-inch pie pans or round cake pans.
- In a large bowl, blend all ingredients except the ice cream until moistened.
- Beat for two minutes at the highest speed.
- Spread half the batter (2-1/4 cups) in the bottom of each prepared pan.
Do not spread up the sides of the pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
- Do not overbake.
- The crusts should collapse to form pie shells.
- Cool completely before filling.
3. In a large bowl, blend softened ice cream until smooth.
- Divide and spread evenly in the center of the pie shells, leaving a 1/2-inch rim.
- If desired, drop spoonfuls of ice cream topping on top and swirl with a knife.
- Freeze pies for at least 2 hours before serving.
- Store in the freezer. Once frozen, wrap airtight to avoid freezer burn.
Note: Do not use 8-inch pans. They are too small.
